LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THE COURT DECLINED TO TAKE THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR SINCE THE TENTATIVE RULING HAD ALREADY BEEN ISSUED, AND ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF PROVIDED EVIDENCE THROUGH THE DECLARATIONS OF AY AND GLADDEN THAT CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
APPEARANCES: Katherine Allen, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, LLP 898-1555 for pltfs & opposing parties; no other appearances.
RULING: Plaintiff indicated that she had a letter from moving party dated 1/7/09 to the Court requesting to take their motion off calendar. The Court declined to take the matter off calendar since the tentative ruling had already been issued and adopted its tentative ruling - THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF PROVIDED EVIDENCE THROUGH THE DECLARATIONS OF AY AND GLADDEN THAT CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR FALSE REPRESENTATION AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
